title: OAuth, Secrets, Identity, and Least Privilege · Threat Case: Least Privilege Tools
summary: Secure a remote MCP server serving user-specific data. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext least privilege tools increment in an OAuth and credential-handling design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map scopes and approvals to narrow tools and user intent.
Keep secrets out of source, prompts, logs, and shared configuration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
